message:
feat(plan): add deadline bounds tracking for rewrite safety side conditions (bd-3hzm)

- Add DeadlineMicros type with min-plus semiring algebra (min, add)
- Extend BudgetEffect with min_deadline/max_deadline tracking
- Add deadline propagation through Join/Race/Timeout analyzers
- Add SideConditionChecker methods: rewrite_preserves_deadline(),
  effective_deadline(), deadline_within_tolerance()
- Fix f64::from(u64) compilation error in consistent_hash tests
- 42 analysis tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
